headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Arch Capital Group, Lowers Price Target to $102
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $105 to $102.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Arch Capital Group, Lowers Price Target to $101
summary: Mizuho  analyst Yaron Kinar   maintains Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $102 to $101.
